tiles.name: street-square
tiles.description: uniform square paver — primary road surface

tiles.name: street-irregular
tiles.description: irregular cobbled paver — alt road surface (use one or the other per road, mixing reads as patchy)

tiles.name: sidewalk-corner
tiles.description: alt sidewalk slab — corners (two perpendicular non-sidewalk neighbors)

tiles.name: culvert
tiles.description: drain culvert doodad — placed at curb edge

tiles.name: bench-s
tiles.description: bench facing south — back of seat read from north sidewalk

tiles.name: bench-e
tiles.description: bench facing east — mirror at render time for a west-facing variant
